notes: This repo is now a pnpm monorepo that publishes the @pacaf/* packages.
Derived repos no longer carry wizard/, wizard-ux/, scripts/, or docs/ trees.
Run npx @pacaf/wizard-ux@latest in a new repo to scaffold a Code App.
Run npx pacaf-update in an existing derived repo to refresh scripts and instructions.
Run npx pacaf-migrate-thin in a legacy 'fat' derived repo to convert it.
Forkers: see FORKING.md and run packages/rebrand/bin/pacaf-rebrand.mjs to retarget scope/prefix.
